@@A. The trace exhibits several issues, including instances of ignoring other agents' suggestions (particularly in the ribbon problem where the mathproxyagent repeatedly requests more information but is ignored), action-reasoning mismatches (where the navigator provides a simplified implementation instead of the actual code), task derailment (proposing simplified implementations instead of finding the correct code), information withholding (providing incomplete information about files), premature termination (failing the Spotify task due to access token issues), and step repetition (repeatedly stating the same information about a function). There are also instances of disobeying task specification and weak verification.
